description: World Time API provides current time and timezone data, including lookups by timezone and IP address. It returns time details in JSON or plain text formats.
summary: worldtimeapi.org exposes one public HTTP API, World Time API, documented at `http://worldtimeapi.org/api` with an OpenAPI spec at `https://api.apis.guru/v2/specs/worldtimeapi.org/20210108/openapi.json`; no auth is defined.
